summary: Comprehensive testing of GOTHRA e-commerce website upgrade. All new features working correctly: search overlay with live results, product detail pages with related products, shop page with category filters, newsletter subscription. Backend 26/26 tests passed. Frontend all core flows working.

issues: Button click can be blocked by toast notifications or Emergent badge overlay - minor UX issue, button still functional

passed_tests: Search overlay opens on click (search icon in header)
Search overlay shows popular suggestions when empty
Search returns live results as user types (tested with 'pickle' - 6 results)
Clicking search result navigates to product detail page
Product detail page shows: image, name, price, description, add to cart button
Product detail page shows 'You May Also Like' related products section
Shop page loads with all 39 products
Category filter tabs work: All Products, Home Decor, Beauty, Herbs & Spices, Kitchen
Category filter changes displayed products correctly
Product name links navigate to product detail page from shop page
Newsletter subscribe form accepts email and shows success message
Newsletter duplicate subscription handled gracefully
Newsletter rejects invalid/empty emails
Add to cart from product detail page works
Cart shows correct items with image, name, price, quantity
Cart total calculated correctly
Scroll to top button appears after scrolling
GET /api/products returns all 39 products
GET /api/products?category={category} filters correctly
GET /api/products?search={query} returns matching products
GET /api/products/{product_id} returns product details
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe works correctly
Cart CRUD operations (add, update, remove, clear) all working
POST /api/checkout/create-session creates Stripe checkout URL
seed_data_creation: None - using existing 39 products from catalog
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from this upgrade are working: search overlay (Ctrl+K or click icon), product detail pages at /product/:productId, shop page with category filters at /shop, newsletter subscription. Backend search uses regex $or across name, description, category fields. 39 products in catalog (prod-001 to prod-039). Stripe checkout integration working with test key.
